_observed: HTTP 201 Created returned (not 200). Response body contains 'item' object with all four required fields. item.id = 4, which is a positive integer greater than the seeded data range (IDs 1-3) — confirms new item was assigned next sequential ID. item.name = 'Validation Widget' matches submitted name. item.description = 'Created by pipeline' matches submitted description. item.in_stock = true matches submitted value. Content-Type is application/json.
